title: Treat a train/validation gap as overfitting
description: When training loss keeps falling while validation loss rises, add regularization or capacity control rather than training longer.
body: Use when validation loss diverges upward from training loss. Do not respond by training more epochs or growing the model — that widens the gap. Actions: introduce or increase regularization (weight decay, dropout, data augmentation), reduce capacity, or add early stopping keyed on validation loss; compare the gap before and after. Validation signals include a narrowing train/val gap and a validation metric that improves or holds. Risk boundary: a model that memorizes training data fails silently on new inputs; if regularization cannot close the gap, the data or labels may be the problem and warrant human review.
